title: ICAI CA Foundation May 2026 Results on July 3, 2026
content:
# ICAI CA Foundation May 2026 Results on July 3, 2026

Ek important update hai. Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne CA Foundation May 2026 Examination ke results ki declaration date announce kar di hai.

*   **Result Declaration Date:** The results of the CA Foundation Examination held in May 2026 will be declared by the afternoon of July 3, 2026.
*   **Accessing Results:** Candidates can access their results on the official ICAI website, caresults.icai.org.
*   **Login Credentials:** To view the results, students will need to enter their Registration Number and Roll Number.
*   **Announcement Date:** This important announcement was made on June 24, 2026.
*   **Issued By:** The announcement was issued by Anand Kumar Chaturvedi, Joint Secretary (Exams).

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=19803)

*Published on: 26 June 2026*
